codeReview.summary: The fix cleanly addresses the prior failure by renaming the canonical top-level admin resource from `organization` to `org` in both parser wiring and parser coverage, bringing the command surface back into alignment with the mission contract.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The cli-worker skill says workers must read the repo `.factory/library/*.md` files before changing code, but this fix session marked `followedProcedure: true` without doing so. The skill or review expectations should be tightened so this prerequisite is either enforced or removed for small parser-only fixes.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Fix transcript skeleton for worker session fdf7ed11-2a6f-4fd5-a8e2-a2e02305bb51 shows reads of mission files, `src/arguments.rs`, `src/main.rs`, and `src/commands/organization.rs`, but no reads from `/Users/ctrdh/Code/toggl-cli/.factory/library/*.md`; handoff.skillFeedback still reports `followedProcedure: true`.

summary: Review passed: commit 1e5e10c fixes the original `organization` vs `org` contract mismatch by updating the top-level command variant, routing, and parser test coverage so the CLI now consistently reflects the mission-defined `toggl org ...` path.
